name: bellwether
description: A weather map, but the fronts are demand.

scripts.vendor: npm i && cp node_modules/us-atlas/states-10m.json data/states-10m.json && node build/bundle.mjs

comment: Build-time only. The app itself ships vendor/libs.js + data/states-10m.json and needs nothing from npm at runtime. Run `npm run vendor` to regenerate them.
